# /buddies — Claude Code Companion Collection

Community collection of Claude Code `/buddy` companions and custom POS assistants from the [AI Mindset {space}](https://t.me/aimindsetclub) community.

## Live

**[claude-buddies.aimindset.org](https://ai-mindset-org.github.io/claude-buddies/)**

## What's inside

**Tab 1 — Claude Buddies:** official `/buddy` companions generated by Claude Code. Each user gets a unique deterministic pet (species, stats, personality) based on their account hash.

**Tab 2 — POS Companions:** custom assistants built by community members — progress trackers, day advisors, research agents, and other tools that live alongside Claude Code.

## Add your buddy

### Option 1: Quick share

Run `/buddy` in Claude Code, screenshot the card, and share it in the [{space} chat](https://t.me/aimindsetclub).

### Option 2: PR

1. Fork this repo
2. Add your buddy data to the `BUDDIES` or `COMPANIONS` array in `index.html`
3. Submit a PR

**Buddy JSON format:**

```json
{
  "name": "Your Buddy Name",
  "species": "CAT",
  "rarity": "COMMON",
  "owner": "@your_telegram",
  "ascii": "ASCII art here",
  "description": "Description from /buddy",
  "stats": {
    "debugging": 0,
    "patience": 0,
    "chaos": 0,
    "wisdom": 0,
    "snark": 0
  },
  "lastSaid": {
    "action": "*action text*",
    "words": "Speech text"
  }
}
```

## Tech

Single-file HTML. No build step. No dependencies. Data embedded as JSON arrays.

## Credits

Built with Claude Code by [@apowall](https://t.me/apowall) for the AI Mindset community.
